---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
A short, clear description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature solve? What is the user need?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed implementation or design.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## Phase / Sprint
Which phase does this belong to? (Phase 1 MVP / Phase 2 Smart Insights / Phase 3 Advanced)

## Additional Context
Mockups, links, or extra detail.
